title: Tamás Kuzmics
text: Home * People * Tamás Kuzmics Tamás Kuzmics , a Hungarian web developer [1] and computer chess programmer. He is author of the open source chess engine tomitankChess , written in JavaScript , also available as mobile app Chess or Sakk under Android and iOS [2] .
